title: What caused this React app to crash?
summary: Google for Developers presents a CI pipeline puzzle where a React app crashes in production after upgrading from React 18 to React 19, caused by an unexpected build speedup tied to cache configuration. The video invites viewers to identify the root cause.
writeup: This video presents a debugging puzzle: a React app crashes in production after an upgrade from React 18 to React 19, and the failure is traced to caching behavior in the build pipeline rather than the application code. It matters because build-system caching can mask version mismatches that only surface in production, making the root cause hard to spot. The key takeaway is that the crash stems from cache configuration in the CI/CD pipeline, and the video frames it as a challenge to identify that root cause.
